title: Token Whale Alert
description: Detect large ERC-20 transfers for any token in real-time — subscribe to wallet activity and fire alerts when a single transfer exceeds a USD threshold.
useCase: Build a whale alert bot that monitors a specific token contract and fires a notification whenever a transfer exceeds $100k — shows sender, receiver, amount, and USD value.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain to monitor for large token transfers
keyParams.tokenAddress: ERC-20 token contract address to watch for whale moves
keyParams.minUsdThreshold: Minimum USD transfer value to trigger a whale alert
